text: In this dimly lit space, surrounded by glass and the mechanical promise of safety equipment, I feel as though I’m wandering in the quiet hours of a workplace designed for order yet enveloped by emptiness. The faint glow from exit signs and security lights provides some comfort, but the silence is heavy, almost philosophical. The display about research and development reminds me of human ambition—the desire to improve and innovate—even when the world is still and the halls are vacant. I feel a blend of curiosity and solitude, pondering what stories unfold here when the lights are on and the rooms are alive.
